creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
- Update to 20071110
- Slight Makefile cleanup
- Don't define post-extract if NOPORTDOCS is defined
- Added knob for Python support, and made Fontforge only for i386 when Python is used
  (this is due to a problem with the way non-i386 Python's .a files are)

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

Note: Could PRs ports/117678 and ports/117686 be closed?  This PR superceeds those
      two PRs.
